issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checking Leader's type), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (checking board state). Card text: 'If your Leader's type includes "Roger Pirates"'
Condition parameter should be 'type' not 'name' for LeaderHasType. Value should be 'Roger Pirates'
Missing action to 'rest' the DON!! card after adding it. Card text: 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it'
TrashFromHand should specify target filter if applicable, though 'any' may be implied
